parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ number: $('Build Messages').first().json.phone_clean, mediatype: 'document', mimetype: 'application/pdf', media: $('PDF to Base64').first().json.pdfBase64, fileName: 'resumen-mirador-villarrica.pdf', caption: $('Build Messages').first().json.whatsappCaption }) }}

={{ (function(){ const b = $('Build Messages').first().json; const status = { email: null, whatsapp: null }; if (b.can_email) { try { const gmail = $('Gmail Send Resumen').first(); status.email = gmail && !gmail.error ? 'ok' : 'failed'; } catch (_) { status.email = 'failed'; } } if (b.can_whatsapp) { try { const wa = $('Evolution Send WA').first().json; const isOk = wa && (wa.key || wa.messageStatus === 'sent' || (wa.status && wa.status >= 200 && wa.status < 300)); status.whatsapp = isOk ? 'ok' : 'failed'; } catch (_) { status.whatsapp = 'failed'; } } const hist = Array.isArray(b.score_history) ? b.score_history.slice() : []; hist.push({ at: new Date().toISOString(), action: 'resumen_enviado', canales: status, email_destino: status.email ? b.email : null, whatsapp_destino: status.whatsapp ? b.phone_clean : null, email_source: b.email_source, whatsapp_source: b.whatsapp_source }); return JSON.stringify({ canales_envio: status, resumen_enviado_at: new Date().toISOString(), score_history: hist }); })() }}

={{ (function(){ const validated = $('Validate Input').first().json; const leadArr = $('Fetch Lead').first().json; const lead = Array.isArray(leadArr) ? leadArr[0] : leadArr; const hist = Array.isArray(lead && lead.score_history) ? lead.score_history.slice() : []; hist.push({ at: new Date().toISOString(), action: 'resumen_fallido', reason: ($json && $json.tool_output_text) || 'unknown', canales_solicitados: validated.canales || [] }); return JSON.stringify({ score_history: hist }); })() }}
